reasoning: Koren, our goal is to enhance your lactate clearance and build fatigue resistance. Given the 25W drop-off between your 5-minute and 20-minute power, we need to focus on strengthening your aerobic base. This workout mimics the demands of the Alpine Loop, focusing on your performance across prolonged efforts, crucial for the key segment from Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12-minutes of Over-Unders: alternate 2 minutes at 209-219W followed by 1 minute at 242-249W, with 3-minute recovery spins at 190W between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
